community_policy: raw local community ids may enter nn.Embedding only inside the isolated Exact-STSE-NoCoord reproduction
coordinate_policy: coordinates are ignored and never loaded into model features
group_key: site::subject_id (sample_key fallback when subject_id is empty)
label_source: sample_index.csv and splits.csv only; .pt labels are ignored
model_selection_policy: validation balanced accuracy with validation AUROC as tie-breaker
signed_edge_policy: positive and negative nonzero edges are both valid
source_global_threshold_policy: .pt global_threshold is retained as metadata only
split_policy: reuse this dedicated frozen 938-sample split; never re-split during training
